chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S-19 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 11-07-2024 Mr. Athar Abbas Solangi, advocate for the applicant a/w applicant Dr. Sikandar Ali Shaikh. Mr. Shewak Rathore, D.P.G for the State Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar and Amanullah Luhur, advocates for respondent No.2..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. With the consent of learned counsel for the parties, the order dated 15.01.2020 (signed on 20.01.2020) whereby the cognizance of the offence outcome of FIR Crime No.27/2018, u/s.316, 149 PPC of P.S Sachal, was taken by learned Civil Judge/J.M-III, Larkana, ignoring the report of police for its cancellation under “C” class, is set-aside with subsequent proceedings taken, if any, with direction to the learned trial Magistrate to pass the same afresh with adequate reasoning, after providing a chance of hearing to all the concerned and considering the report of Sindh Health Care Commission. The instant Crl.Misc.Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
